item.title: afonsopacifer/awesome-flexbox May 15th, 2015
item.description:
Featured Projects

  • flex-boxstars2 - A Custom Element to make the basics of flexbox easier to use.
  • Flexbugsstars12.9k - A community-curated list of flexbox issues and cross-browser workarounds for them.
  • Solved by flexboxstars12.9k - A showcase of problems once hard or impossible to solve with CSS alone, now made trivially easy with Flexbox.:metal:
